reason: Architecture gap scan reports 18% match and lists src/runtime/llm.js, stt.js, tts.js, sense.js, memory.js, src/server/hub.js, brain.js, api.js, src/detector/profiles.js as 'missing' — but all these files exist on disk. The stale scan is causing repeated creation of redundant milestones (m45-m57) targeting already-implemented files, wasting planning cycles.
proposedChange: Re-run the architecture gap scan against the current codebase to produce an accurate match score and gap list. The scan should verify file existence before marking gaps as 'missing'.
